title: ctenodon leptostachyus
intro: Ctenodon leptostachyus, also known as the "False Dragon Head" or "Leptostachys Ctenodon," is a type of plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ctenodon leptostachyus include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
